mapper.select: /*disMgmtMapper.getPrcCstmr*/ SELECT A.TRG_FNL_SEQ ,A.TRG_FNL_INF_SEQ ,A.CONTRACT_NUM ,B.SVC_CNTR_NO AS NCN ,A.PRMT_ID ,A.EVNT_CD ,A.EVNT_TRTM_DT ,A.EFFECTIVE_DATE ,B.CUSTOMER_ID ,B.SUBSCRIBER_NO FROM MSP_DIS_TRG_FNL A ,MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.TRG_FNL_SEQ = #{trgFnlSeq} AND A.PROC_YN = 'N'
/*disMgmtMapper.getPrcMstSeq*/ SELECT ('PM' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(SQ_DIS_PM.NEXTVAL, '000000'))) AS PRC_MST_SEQ FROM DUAL
/*disMgmtMapper.getPrcDtlSeq*/ SELECT ('PD' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(SQ_DIS_PD.NEXTVAL, '000000'))) AS PRC_DTL_SEQ FROM DUAL
